name: system-info
description: One-shot system information reporter - dumps comprehensive MMI3G state to SD card on insert. Non-destructive, installs nothing to flash.
author: dspl1236
scripts: sysinfo_dump.sh - Comprehensive system report to SD card
report_sections: Navigation database (acios_db.ini, PKG, FSC, unblocker status)
notes: Inspired by DrGER2/MMI3G-Info. Outputs both a single combined report and individual data files for easy parsing. Does not modify anything on the MMI - read-only operation.
